title: Estimating the Cyclic Spectrum in Practice
description: Time- and frequency-smoothing cyclic periodogram estimators, and the FFT Accumulation Method (FAM) and Strip Spectral Correlation Algorithm (SSCA) used in practice.
objectives: Describe time-smoothing and frequency-smoothing cyclic periodogram estimators as the two-dimensional analogue of Bartlett/Welch averaging
Explain what the FFT Accumulation Method (FAM) and Strip Spectral Correlation Algorithm (SSCA) compute and why they're the practical workhorses for SCF estimation
Explain why estimating a 2D surface over frequency and cycle frequency is far more computationally demanding than estimating an ordinary 1D PSD
